title: Hot's Aerostuff
description: A rabble of new Aeronautics bits
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b14f91a3769adccad012747d85c73a70243983.gif)

Some various blocks that I wanted in the game. Currently comprised of the link relay, redstone levitite, copycat sails, copycat symmetric sails, the analog torsion spring, and copycat link casings.

##  REDSTONE LEVITITE
Acts as levitite when powered by redstone.

![Redstone Levitite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac368502b2a58c0d128def9caab2b608f21149c3.gif)

<details>
<summary>Redstone Levitite</summary>
  
Can be created by using a redstone torch on levitite blend.
All connected redstone levitite will be powered if one recieves power.
</details>
 
##  COPYCAT SAILS
Adds both a copycat windmill sail and a copycat symmetric sail.

![copycat sail plane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1929b96ffc40af53b783e1f4095085660a933e8c.gif)

<details>
<summary>Copycat Sails</summary>
  
![copycat sail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a563165f757414d3c40330d81bd92c554bb013.png)

![copycat symmetric sail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dc45fcd7c0875053754bc69a9d5853cfac4eeb3.png)

Crafted with a zinc ingot surrounded by 4 sails.
</details>

##  ANALOG TORSION SPRING
Similar to a torsion spring, but the max angle is dependent on redstone signal strength and the set value.

![analog torsion spring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2c8efb82d18d53c2a6600b10352e419debb00d.gif)

<details>
<summary>Analog Torsion Spring</summary>
  
Each redstone strength increment corresponds to 1/15 of the set angle. Meaning at a signal strength of 0, there will be no rotation, and at a signal strength of 15 (max) it will act as a normal torsion spring. Crafted with a brass casing, a shaft, a spring, and an electron tube.
</details>

##  COPYCAT LINK CASING
Right click any redstone link with a copycat panel to encase it.

![copycat link casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/024ae0020687fe043dc311610f5e76df7415976b.gif)

<details>
<summary>Copycat Link Casing</summary>
  
Adds functionality to the copycat panel to hide redstone links. Is flush with copycat panels. Can also be encased with andesite and brass casings for a full block casing.
</details>

##  LINK RELAY
Compact utility block for Create’s Redstone Link system that lets you remap wireless frequencies. 

![Engine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2fa7d1ac75d841ce798fac2a4fc0ebc9af9e17f.gif)


<details>
<summary>Link Relay</summary>
Set an input frequency pair and an output frequency pair, and any signal received on the input will be transmitted on the output. You can stack unlimited bindings in a single relay block.
  
  This item stemmed out of frustration for not being able to fit the controls on my small aeronautics engine, and having ground relays meant that the controls would break down when I flew further than 256 blocks.

![A complicated system of redstone links](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09399f8ade2d9d4b1a4e2cf01ec2c38c156b713b_0.webp)

^The old system^

Simplified down to a single block

![link relay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5611f99821c1beb15d29c28c9c05e6b1492a448f_0.webp)

The relay also allows you to invert to the signal, so the output frequency is always active unless it is recieving the input.
</details>
